Miami Vice (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $63,478,838Details
International Box Office $101,441,238
Worldwide Box Office $164,920,076
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $38,193,864
Total $38,193,864
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Cops Sonny Crockett and Ricardo Tubbs see the lines between their real and undercover lives become blurred as they try to find the people involved for three murders.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$25,723,815 (40.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$135,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,021 opening theaters/3,026 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $109,610,017

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 28th, 2006 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: August 10th, 2006 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: December 5th, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, language and some sexual content.
Running Time: 132 minutes
Plot point: Drug Cartels, FBI, Narcotics, Police Detective, Undercover
Social setting: Film Noir, Organized Crime
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States, Paraguay, Uruguay, Germany
Languages: English
